items.title: [正面] [h1] Gacha Slay the Spire with a great story [/h1]...
items.summary:
[h1] Gacha Slay the Spire with a great story [/h1]
[h2] About the combat [/h2]
[h3] How does it work ? [/h3]
The combat system uses cards, in a similar way to StS, yet it also has its own spin on it with abilities that charge up and allow you to not [i]just[/i] play cards.
[strike]Rogue-like[/strike] - [b]Roguelite[/b]
Kind of, the levels are independent, you upgrade your characters & cards permanently out of the levels, yet during the levels, you have access to temporary alterations & objects that can change up your gameplay a lot (or very little !).
This game has the freshness of a roguelite for levels, without the more frustrating aspects of RNG, and a very traditional character upgrade system.
[h3] Is it hard ? [/h3]
Yes, no, maybe ?
You have the option to "farm up" a bit if you're getting stat-checked, or you can just consider it a skill issue and press forward.
I'd say [b]regarding the main story of the game, it is only as hard as you want it to be[/b] : you are allowed to expend free resources to revive, you can overlevel your characters & their "equipment", you can reroll to hit that relic you wanted in the shop ... Or you can face it without any of that and feel a fair bit of challenge.
In terms of difficulty, main story is exponential, starts out very slow, and then scales fast, requiring you to assemble a coherent team and pilot it efficiently, which may be harder for certain teams ([i]yet never truly impossible, just keep trying ![/i]).
[hr][/hr]
[h2] About the story [/h2]
[h3] Is it good ? [/h3]
HELL YEAH, go read it !
[h3] Is the translation good ? [/h3]
Well, it's getting better and better. The game was machine-translated, and now the studio has an official translator working on it, plus volunteers helping.
Chapters 1-3 have been humanly reviewed & adjusted, the rest in on the way ([i]objective is full main story redone by end of year[/i]).
If you're accustomed to reading bad scanlation, this will not feel very different (though the human-translated parts are far better than that).
[h3] What is it about ? [/h3]
Something's [i][b]erasing[/b][/i] people, and turning them into monsters.
In a cemetery filled with tombs of your predecessors, whose names have been forgotten due to the mysterious phenomenon, you sign up to continue the investigation into what this plague is, and who (or [i]what[/i]) is behind it.
Surrounded by [strike]the reanimated corpse of dead children[/strike] your companions, you dive into a fight against the end of the world, and discover that some people are not too keen on helping you ...


If this didn't get you to try the game, I swear it's even better, i'm just bad at selling it to you.
On the contrary, if you're ready to try, [spoiler]consider using my invite code : BR3F9WOY4X[/spoiler]
